mapper.sql:
WHERE 1 = 1
AND L.ACTION_DATE >= to_date(#{startDt}, 'YYYYMMDD')
AND L.ACTION_DATE <= to_date(#{endDt}, 'YYYYMMDD')
AND L.USER_CD ILIKE '%' || #{userCd} || '%'
AND L.USER_NAME ILIKE '%' || #{userNm} || '%'
AND L.PROGRAM_NM ILIKE '%' || #{menuNm} || '%'
mapper.select:
SELECT L.LOG_ID AS logId, COALESCE(L.ACTION_TIME::text, '') AS actionTime, L.USER_NAME AS userName, L.PROGRAM_NM AS programNm, COALESCE(L.ACTION_DATE::text, '') AS actionDate, L.GROUP_ID AS groupId, L.USER_ID AS userId, L.USER_CD AS userCd, L.PROGRAM_ID AS programId, L.PROGRAM_WHERE AS programWhere FROM mhdb.TB_USER_LOGS L
ORDER BY L.ACTION_TIME DESC NULLS LAST, L.LOG_ID DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
